description: Intelligent and monstrous sea-dwellers — merfolk, krakens, and the terrors of the deep.
creatures: Merfolk
Half-human, half-fish beings who build coral cities on the ocean floor and wield tridents of shell and bone.
Sahuagin
Shark-toothed sea raiders that attack in frenzied packs when they smell blood in the water.
Kuo-toa
Goggle-eyed fish-folk with sticky hands whose collective belief can will a god into existence.
Sea Hag
A wretched ocean crone so hideous that meeting her gaze can stop a heart.
Siren
A hauntingly beautiful sea creature whose irresistible song lures sailors onto the rocks.
Kraken
A colossal, tentacled nightmare from the deepest trenches that drags entire ships beneath the waves.
Sea Serpent
A sinuous marine dragon with crushing coils that summons storms and shatters hulls.
Aboleth
An ancient psychic horror lurking in sunless depths, its slimy tentacles enslaving minds for millennia.
Chuul
A barnacle-crusted, lobster-like predator that paralyzes prey and drags it to its underwater lair.
Water Weird
A sentient coil of water that lurks in wells and fountains, drowning anyone who reaches in.
Scrag
A webbed, finned troll that lurks in murky depths and heals its wounds as fast as they're dealt.
Giant Squid
A deep-dwelling titan with tentacles thick as tree trunks that drags prey down into blackness.
